name: Orange Mango Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the zest from the orange using a zester or grater; set aside.
2. Cut a flat bottom on the orange, then remove all the peel and white pith with a small, sharp knife. Cut the orange into 1/4-inch slices and refrigerate until serving time.
3. Peel the mangoes and remove the pits.
4. Puree the flesh of the mangoes with the orange zest in a food processor or blender until smooth.
5. Strain the puree through a fine mesh strainer into a 1 1/2-quart refrigerator container.
6. Stir in the buttermilk, orange juice, and honey to taste. Adjust the consistency so it is similar to whipping cream; add more buttermilk if needed.
7. Chill thoroughly for up to 2 days before serving.
8. Just before serving, stir in lemon juice (if necessary) and additional honey. Pour into chilled dishes. Garnish with an orange slice and a mint leaf. Makes 4 Cups
